11.reason: [Error: missing check i>0 to avoid out-of-bounds access; also should be i<len-1 to allow expansion when '-' is at second-last position]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: missing check i>0 to avoid out-of-bounds access; also should be i<len-1 to allow expansion when '-' is at second-last position]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition i<len-2 incorrectly prevents processing valid expansions like "a-d" (length 3) and lacks i>0 to prevent out-of-bounds access to data[i-1]. It should be i>0 && i<len-1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing i>0 check causes out-of-bounds access to data[-1] if the string starts with '-'; i<len-2 incorrectly prevents expansion for 3-character strings like "a-b", should be i>0 && i<len-1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition 'i<len-2' is incorrect. It should be 'i>0 && i<len-1' to ensure that both data[i-1] and data[i+1] are valid indices. The current condition allows i to be 0, leading to data[-1] access when i=0, which is undefined behavior. Also, 'i<len-2' excludes the last possible '-' at position len-2 (e.g., in "a-b", len=3, '-' is at index 1 = len-2), so it should be 'i < len - 1'.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition 'i<len-2' is incorrect. It should be 'i>0 && i<len-1' to ensure that both data[i-1] and data[i+1] are valid indices. The current condition allows accessing data[i+1] when i == len-2, which is okay, but fails to check that i>0 before accessing data[i-1], leading to out-of-bounds access when '-' is at index 0. Also, 'i<len-2' excludes the case where '-' is at len-2 (second last), which is actually valid since i+1 would be len-1.]

7.reason: gets is removed in the C11 standard and causes compilation errors in modern environments; use scanf("%s", data) or fgets instead.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  gets is removed in the C11 standard and causes compilation errors in modern environments; use scanf("%s", data) or fgets instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors or warnings with modern compilers. It should be replaced with 'fgets'.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors or warnings with modern compilers. It should be replaced with 'fgets'.]
